inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial purchase price of the asset

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial purchase price of the asset
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de compra inicial del activo

inputs.label: Acquisition Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs associated with purchasing the asset (e.g., brokerage fees)

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs associated with purchasing the asset (e.g., brokerage fees)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlığın satın alınmasıyla ilgili maliyetler (ör. komisyon ücretleri)
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten im Zusammenhang mit dem Erwerb des Vermögenswerts (z. B. Maklergebühren)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais liés à l'achat de l'actif (ex. frais de courtage)
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos asociados con la compra del activo (p. ej., comisiones de corretaje)

inputs.label: Improvement Cost
inputs.businessContext: Costs of improvements made to the asset

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs of improvements made to the asset
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des améliorations apportées à l'actif
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de mejoras realizadas al activo

inputs.label: Exemption Amount
inputs.businessContext: Tax-exempt amount, if applicable (e.g., primary residence exemption)

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax-exempt amount, if applicable (e.g., primary residence exemption)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa vergiden muaf tutar (ör. birincil konut muafiyeti)
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuerfreier Betrag, falls zutreffend (z. B. Freibetrag für selbstgenutztes Wohneigentum)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant exonéré d'impôt, le cas échéant (ex. exonération de la résidence principale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto exento de impuestos, si aplica (p. ej., exención por residencia principal)
Tasa impositiva aplicable a las ganancias de capital (porcentaje)
